/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/tests/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/action_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/input_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/pipewire_capture.cpp.o -o benchmark  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpipewire-0.3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libevdev.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libturbojpeg.so
